title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH CLACKAMAS HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling, support groups, mental health evaluations, and education to people seeking a wellness-focused approach to living and dying. Offers inegrated treatment services including Naturopathic medicine, Chinese medicine and acupuncture for mental health disorders, chemical dependency, cancer and provides case management for HIV/AIDS. 112 Beavercreek Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday- Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 238-5203 155 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 238-5203 ext 155 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, most private insurances, BCBS/OMIP, and private pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Trimet bus 33, located in the Clackamas County Health Department Campus Services: Cancer Clinics Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Conjoint Counseling Group Counseling Health/Disability Related Counseling * AIDS/HIV Health/Disability Related Support Groups Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH CLACKAMAS
